message: Run node bindings tests in CI

files.patch:
@@ -57,7 +57,8 @@ jobs:
         uses: tree-sitter/parser-test-action@v2
         with:
           test-rust: true
-          test-node: false
+          test-node: true
+          node-version: 20
           test-python: true
           test-go: true
           test-swift: false
